ddls:
CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., country, state, city) */,
  "entity_description" TEXT /* Description of the entity */,
  "entity_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the entity's geographic center */,
  "entity_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the entity's geographic center */,
  "entity_area" REAL /* Area of the entity in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data entry */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity the population data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the population data was recorded */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Urban population of the entity in the given year */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Rural population of the entity in the given year */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the entity in the given year */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (people per square kilometer) */,
  "urban_population_density" REAL /* Urban population density (people per square kilometer) */,
  "rural_population_density" REAL /* Rural population density (people per square kilometer) */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Year-over-year growth rate of the total population */,
  "urban_population_growth_rate" REAL /* Year-over-year growth rate of the urban population */,
  "rural_population_growth_rate" REAL /* Year-over-year growth rate of the rural population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urban_rural_percentages" (
  "percentage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each percentage entry */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population data the percentages belong to */,
  "urban_percentage" REAL /* Urban population percentage of the entity in the given year */,
  "rural_percentage" REAL /* Rural population percentage of the entity in the given year */,
  "urban_population_change" INTEGER /* Change in urban population from the previous year */,
  "rural_population_change" INTEGER /* Change in rural population from the previous year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("percentage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urban_rural_percentages_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES population_data ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_joined_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the population data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the population data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES population_data ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population data being exported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user exporting the population data */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the population data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "export_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the export was made */,
  "export_file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the exported file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES population_data ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population data the report is based on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., urbanization rate, population trend) */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary or abstract of the report */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES population_data ("population_id")
)
